titleStmt.title: Stone Urn found near Hpayahtaung Pagoda, Sriksetra

licence.p: This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 Unported Licence. To view a copy of the licence, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ or send a letter to Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.

projectDesc.p: The project DHARMA has received funding from the European Research Council (ERC) under the European Union's Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme (grant agreement no 809994).

prefixDef.p: Public URIs with the prefix bib to point to a Zotero Group Library named ERC-DHARMA whose data are open to the public.
Internal URIs using the part prefix to point to person elements in the DHARMA_idListMembers_v01.xml file.

div.ab:
1 siddhaM 2.Asama ḅa tgiMṁ tnaY piNṁḥ toNḥ tiṁ pṅauY plaTṁ tiRṁ kuNḥ truK thaYḥ ḅa ncuMḥ tkaRṁḥ psuYḥ ḅa knaṄ diKṃṁ nmaT goY kdliKṁ tiṁ gaṃ psuYḥ tiṁ kdiṄṁ barami O thmiNḥ kyiṁ ta kḅoṄḥ tiṁ nga mahagaruṇa tiṁ kyaNṁ ktoY piNṁḥ O piṁ thraḥ ma diṃṁ kdluḥ tiṁ pra tiṁ hna ṅuḥ kto tiṁ gaṁ vaṃ bi ka baR ta kdaNṁ khyaṃ tiNṁ viṃṁ lo nhoḥ O ḥ kvi ḅūdha ḅaYṁḥ kda tu tda ḥ rya [s]da saḥ tliṄ saṄgha ḅa[Y]ṁḥ kviṃṁ O ḅiNṁḥ raY piRṁ hnaM O hnauT tsaṁḥ tiṁ kliṁḥ duṃḥ ḅaḥ kkiR kvaY kviṃṁ O nyaṄ tiṁ kiTṁḥ ḅa knuY tyaṄ tiṁ giḥ nhoMḥ radaṃna ḅaYṁḥ kviṃṁ tṅaM piNṁḥ diNṃṁ pdiNṁ ptuK ktoY tiṁ tdluṄḥ O puN sri tdaVṃḥ ḅaYṁḥ sri OṄ luṄ hiP tiRṁ hnaM tiṁ sdiNṁ tiṁ tdiKṃ kviṃṁ O nḅuNḥ pau ḅaYṁḥ O ktiṄṁḥ tdaVṃḥ ḅaYṁḥ tniṄṁ OṄ viYṃṁ tiRṁ hnaM kaṄ sri deṃvamiTtra ḅaYṁḥ kviṃṁ O nḅuNḥ piRṁ tuM knuY pau ḅaYṁḥ O CoṄḥ tdaVṃḥ ḅaYṁḥ tniṄṁ OṄ luṄ hiP tiRṁ hnaM kaṄ sri hariviKkrama ḅaYṁḥ hraTṁ tiNṁ yaṄ kḅoṄḥ tiṁ tma ḅaYṁḥ kviṃṁ O
mrauT kgaṃḥ pau ḅaYṁḥ O ndloK tdaVṃḥ ḅaYṁḥ sri OṄ luṄ snuḥ siṄhaviKkrama niṁ yaḥ tiṁ kliṁḥ tiṁ pdliKṁ O sdaṄ ḅaYṁḥ kviṃṁ O nḅuNḥ tiNṁ kiRṁḥ tgiMṁ brahma pau ḅaYṁḥ O ḅaṄ tdaVṃḥ ḅaYṁḥ tniṄṁ OṄ hiP tiRṁ hnaM kaṄ sri suriyaviKkrama ḅaYṁḥ kviṃṁ O va roM ndloK ḅaYṁḥ O pjauY toK tkoḥ pe ḅaṁḥ O kdaṃṁ snuḥ sri brithuviKkrama niṁ yaḥ nmaT ḥ nkiṁḥ tiṁ vaṄṃḥ ḅaYṁḥ kuṄ tiNṁ dliNṁ sri jaNtranana ḅaYṁḥ O nmuḥ pguṃ ruT driVṁ kbaK tiRṁ gaNṃ O pṅauY tiNṁ kiṁḥ haḥ piNṁḥ O va ḅaYṁḥ O diNṃṁ ta paYṁḥ hneṄ diṃ O diṃṁ ta paYṁḥ ptiṁ sdoḥ ste mgauṃḥ pū na gha dra ktoY tiNṁ ya O ngaMṃḥ tgaṃṁḥ tpoY sdaṄṃ tiṁ pdeRṃ tiṁ pdaRṃ tiṁ daTṃṁ kdaMḥ piRṁ ṭloḥ ṭliMṁ kriYṁḥ tiṁ ka tiRṁ yaḥ paṄ O tgaMṃ ktoY kkiṄṁ tiNṁ yaṄ ta kḅoṄḥ tiṁ tma ta tiṁ ptiRṁ tiṁ pṭraY ta kgiNṃṁḥ tiṁ tnaḥ ḅuTdha ḅaYṁḥ kviṃṁ O co tiṁ yaḥ saṄgha duKṃ kkiNṁ tiṁ kniKṁ ḅa khmiK CCiN kviṁ O nyaN Ci tdiKṃ ḅa doṄṃ ḅaYṁḥ O caṄḥ tdaVṃḥ tiṁ priṄḥ khyaṃ viṃṁ
tgaN duKṃ kṅuḥ ḅaYṁḥ bradima diNṃṁ ta paYṁḥ tiṁ phlaṄ tiṁ sbaNḥ the the tiṁḥ pauḥ piRṁ ṅaN hiN tko tiṁ vuṄ kṅuṄ hraTṁ sauṄ plaTṁ kiP viṁ O diNṁ ḅiNṁḥ ṭraṄḥ kdaVṃ ḅiNṁḥ miCṁ piNṁ dra khliṁḥ O plaṁḥ ni khuḥ sa ma neR tvo saṄgha tiṁ tmaN tiṁ siṁ riḥ vaṄṃ diRṃṁ paYṁḥ kkuTṃ tiṁ pḅiNḥ paYṁḥ kro tiṁ kso paṁḥ ksi ksa paṁḥ kduḥ taṁ ḥ paṁḥ tiṁ pjaC tiṁ piCṁ pjaḥ O riṁḥ kCa tiṁ gaṃ hau kla O la da vaṁḥ phi O diṃṁḥ ndaṁ ta paYṁḥ tiṁ kdliMṁ tiṁ kmuR O sguṄṃ kno O dvaṃ ṭloḥ tiR deN piTṁ ṅaT thliḥ ṅiṁ kdaṄ ndloMḥ kloḥ ḅiNṁḥ pdiNṃ tguNḥ ḅiṁḥ kdiṃṁ sgauNṃ ḅiNṁḥ pṅaN rya ḅaYṁḥ O nḅuNḥ kriḥ mruṄ to toY thṅa ta kḅiṁ ḅaYṁḥ vaṄṃ ḅiNṁḥ ḅaMḥ duPṃ pgiPṃṁ pdauNṃ kdaPṃ ṭlaN rṭlaN troMḥ tṅaVḥ pa go thliḥ paṄ raṄṁḥ nu rnuṄ thuva cetya tiNṁ maT kuḥ kuṄḥ mūṄḥ ḅiNṁḥ mūṄḥ nuT hliṁḥ kṅaM dliNṁ paYṁḥ tiṁ pgoY tiṁ pbaNḥ doNṃḥ kaṄ pa ḅaYṁḥ ngaMṃḥ daVṃḥ tdaVṃḥ to tniṃṁ O ra hi tiṁ hna kaṄ sri diTṃtyaviKkrama piRṁ kuN toY tkiRṁḥ sma kliṁḥ ryaḥ kgaṃḥ tiNṁ droḥ ktoY tiṁ khnoṄ kdiṃ tiNṁ doṄḥ tkiNḥ kli tūNḥ daVṃḥ
ndiKṃ droṄ hra ḅaYṁḥ rviṃṁ kdoN tiṁ tnaY staMṁḥ thṅaMḥ tiMṁ nuC tiMṁ CduṄḥ M T k r iḥ yaṁ tiRṁ hiMṁ psuYḥ kni mū tyaṄḥ O yaṄḥ tyaṄḥ ktoY siRṁ k ñ aTṁ msauṄ ḅiṁ goY nmaT kdliKṁ daṃḥ daMṃḥ knuY tiṁ thliḥ dra tiṁ priṄḥ tsaḥ piRṁ ṅa ta kdiM tiṁ traMḥ kdaṄ ksiṁ knaṄ pyauM mba da raR puja da vaṃḥ mdeṄ ga ra kdi tiṁ ma ta ma kaḥ bo ba pūja vaḥ O hnau tiṁ priṄḥ piṁḥ ca kha kgaṃḥ tiṁ O hle hleḥ ḅa ma Co naṁ rnaṁ hṅa hṅaR tiṁ priṄḥ duCṃ O pa ka bi ki O giMṃṁ haC dra O kkiCṁ tiṁ piNṁ mau thraṄḥ ma vaṄṃ O paṄ diṃ ḅa kiCṁ vaKṃ tiṁ kliṁḥ tiNṁ droḥ ca kha kteṄḥ tiṁ smuN ca kha ḅiṁ ksiḥ tiṁ sba vaṄṃ paṄ taK ḅu knaNṁḥ tiNṁ hraḥ ktoY dra tiRṁ hnaM ḅaYṁḥ tniR doKḥ ṅaV kṭloT roM ndloT sdaṃ ḅaYṁḥ kdaṄ pḅe tiNṁ dliNṁ ṅiTṁ kdaṄ ktiṄṁḥ ndraḥ ḅaYṁḥ paṄ ca kha mraṄ meruva O tcoM nuT kgoY ḅa khmiKṁ knuY rla tiNṁ ṭroṄḥ nraTḥ O tbu nuT kṅaM tiṁ kvoC kdliKṁ O kūN tiNṁ k r i ṅraḥ ḅuNḥ nCaMḥ ktoY tiRṁ tcoM tliṄ nuT ḅaYṁḥ O paṄ ṅaM ḅoṄḥ pdraY tru tiṁ kyiṁḥ kdaṄ nhlaK ktoY hniTṁ O hnau tiṁ pdeNṃḥ tiṁ sphiR triP saḥ mra ngaṃ
tiRṁ vaNṃḥ vaN baMṁḥ na tiṁ pkiNṁ ktuNḥ ktoY duKṃ ktoY ktoY tiNṁ droṃḥ tiṁ ptiKṁ tiṁ khnoṄ tiRṁ mu duK nduK O ngaṁ nuT ḅaYṁḥ O paṄ ṅaM giNṃṁḥ tma ḅaYṁḥ O paṄ ṅaM tdiNṁ mdrauṄ tgaṃḥ mliṄ mraṄ O phaR nhṅiNṁḥ nḅiṁḥ tiṁ ngaK baṄ tlaNḥ mahaRnava O tcoM nuT O paṄ ṅaM loT tloṄ ḅa tduKḥ tdraK tniR doRḥ O ḅaṁḥ O pla plau ktoY tiṁ ḅuḥ tCaḥ ḅaṁḥ ne mi la tiṁ ḅaḥ kduḥ mre hlau hlau na dra yaṁ
t k gaḥ tiṁ ya tiṁ hiṁ pa ma ḥ kni paṁ
ka ra Cu
ta ḅa doṃ mra ba ndloM ba kca kkuṄḥ tiṁ tḅaKṁḥ knuR tiCṁ ṅaM kgaM tiMṁ gaṃ O plaṁḥ doNḥ ṅaC nū roM ndloK ḅaYṁḥ O paYṁḥ hṅaMḥ pgoY cetya thuva O ñaḥ tiṁ hna dra mra kdaṄ vo vaṄṃ diNṃṁ ksiḥ piRṁ mo diNṃṁ kiNṁ sba diTṃṁ ptu pliṁ ngaMṃḥ kaPpa O nhra nuC tiṁ kvo kuḥ kuṄḥ ḅnuḥ tiṁ gaṃ khi kha kṭloT tiṁ kdiTṁ paYṁḥ viṁ nguṃ tiṁ traT APbrameya kgoY tiNṁ maT kṭliK tiṁ tgiMṃṁḥ sīTdha sīTdha sīTdha sādhu sādhu sādhu kliṁḥ kliṁḥ kliṁḥ .@

div.p: (in Burmese), 120-1 (15-16) and focused only on names and dates of the [Vikrama] kings mentioned in the inscription, but a complete study by Than Tun, Nyein Maung and San Win, with Romanized transliteration, was published in 11: 133 ff.. The inscription has been published again, with a revised transliteration, in 71-83. Re-edited here from published photographs and our team’s RTIs.
div.note: San Win 2000-1 is an English version of 1998. The complete reading furnished in the Document section of MHRJ 11, pp. 133ff., was probably done by Than Tun, Nyein Maung and San Win to whom the reading in Appendix to Tun Aung Chain's article in the same issue is ascribed.
